citations.text: AI4K12 Initiative (2020-2022). Five Big Ideas in Artificial Intelligence, Grade Band Progression Charts. A joint project of AAAI and CSTA, funded by NSF award DRL-1846073.

statement.en: "Narrow AI" has given us a collection of algorithms that are good at specific things. "Broad AI" or "General AI" promises to give us general reasoning ability comparable to a human.
